text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation here, standing before this glass barrier into the R+D space. The room beyond seems to hum with potential, the bold letters and glowing screens suggesting innovation and possibility. My reflection merges with the environment; I am both observer and participant in this unfolding experiment of human curiosity. The sterile brightness and clean lines make me reflect on how environments shape thought—does creativity thrive in order or chaos? I feel ready to step across the threshold, to discover what ideas await beyond the glass.
